creator: jamie@bishopston.net
text:
With the flash player development heavily being conducted in emulation@, and the
new linux-f8-flashplayer10 just being introduced by the same group, it makes sense
for the current flashplayer ports to be assigned to the same group of people, so
as to coordinate efforts.

Also, I currently do not have enough time to keep up with current flash development.

Therefore, please reassign maintainership of these 2 ports to this group.

In the future I hope to pick up some other unmaintained ports.

Thanks, Jamie
